handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_contract_details {"req_id":"$req1","contract":{"symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD","primary_exchange":"","local_symbol":""}}
server contract_details {"req_id":"$req1","contract":{"symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD","primary_exchange":"","local_symbol":""},"market_name":"NMS","min_tick":"0.01","time_zone_id":"US/Eastern"}
server contract_details_end {"req_id":"$req1"}
disconnect
